report.title: ARIA Form Components Accessibility Enhancement Report

components.name: GlassColorPicker
ariaEnhancements: Added aria-label to color trigger button
Added aria-haspopup='dialog' to indicate popup behavior
Added aria-expanded to track popup state
Added aria-disabled for disabled state
Added role='dialog' and aria-modal='true' to color picker popover
Added aria-label to close button
Added proper htmlFor/id associations for all slider labels
Added role='slider' to range inputs
Added aria-labelledby, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuenow, aria-valuetext to all sliders (Hue, Saturation, Lightness, Alpha)
Added aria-label to RGB input fields with value indicators
Added role='group' and aria-labelledby to color palettes
Added aria-label and aria-pressed to palette color buttons
Added aria-hidden='true' to decorative icons
patterns: Dialog/Modal pattern with role='dialog' and aria-modal
Slider pattern with complete value semantics
Button group pattern for color selection
Proper label associations for all form controls

components.name: GlassFileUpload
ariaEnhancements: Added aria-label to file input
Added role='button' to upload drop zone
Added aria-label and aria-describedby to drop zone
Added aria-disabled to drop zone when disabled
Added keyboard support with tabIndex and onKeyDown
Added id to instructions for aria-describedby reference
Added aria-label to browse button
Added role='region' and aria-label to file list container
Added role='list' and aria-labelledby to uploaded files list
Added role='listitem' to each file preview
Added aria-label to remove buttons
Added role='status' for completed uploads
Added role='alert' for upload errors
Added role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-label to upload progress
Added aria-hidden='true' to decorative file icons
patterns: File upload pattern with drag-and-drop support

components.name: GlassFormTable
ariaEnhancements: Added role='region' and aria-label to table container
Added role='table' and aria-label to table element
Added role='row' to table rows
Added role='columnheader' to table headers
Added aria-label to actions column header
Added role='gridcell' to table cells
Added aria-label to each input field describing its purpose
Added aria-label to remove buttons
Added aria-label to add row button
patterns: Grid pattern for editable data table
Proper table semantics with ARIA roles
Descriptive labels for each editable cell

components.name: GlassFormStepper
ariaEnhancements: Added nav element with aria-label='Form steps'
Added role='button' to each step
Added comprehensive aria-label describing step status
Added aria-current='step' for active step
Added aria-disabled for disabled steps
Added keyboard support with tabIndex and onKeyDown
Applied to both horizontal and vertical orientations

components.name: GlassMultiStepForm
ariaEnhancements: Added role='group' and aria-label to progress section
Added aria-live='polite' to progress indicators
Added role='progressbar' with complete value semantics to progress bar
Added nav element with aria-label to step indicators
Added role='button' to step indicator buttons
Added comprehensive aria-label with step status
Added aria-current='step' for current step
Added keyboard support with onKeyDown
Added aria-hidden='true' to decorative icons and numbers
Added role='alert' and aria-live='assertive' to validation errors
patterns: Multi-step form pattern with progress tracking
Live region pattern for dynamic updates

components.name: GlassWizard
ariaEnhancements: Added nav element with aria-label='Wizard steps'
Added comprehensive aria-label to step buttons
Added aria-current='step' for active step
Added aria-disabled for disabled steps
Added role='alert' and aria-live='assertive' to error messages
Added aria-hidden='true' to decorative icons

components.name: GlassStep
ariaEnhancements: Added role='button' or role='listitem' based on clickability
Added comprehensive aria-label with step number, title, and status
Added aria-current='step' for active step
Added aria-disabled for disabled steps
Enhanced keyboard support with proper tabIndex management

components.name: GlassStepIcon
ariaEnhancements: Added aria-hidden='true' as icons are decorative (status communicated via parent)

components.name: GlassStepLabel
ariaEnhancements: No changes needed - text content is already accessible via parent

components.name: GlassChatInput
ariaEnhancements: Added role='list' and aria-label to attachments container
Added role='listitem' to each attachment
Added id and aria-label to textarea
Added aria-describedby to link character count
Added aria-multiline='true' to textarea
Added aria-live='polite' to character count
Added aria-label to attachment button
Added aria-label and aria-pressed to voice recording button
Added aria-hidden='true' to decorative icons

components.name: GlassInlineEdit
ariaEnhancements: Added role='group' and aria-label to container
Added aria-label to input field
Added aria-label to Save button
Added aria-label to Cancel button
Added aria-label to edit trigger button
patterns: Toggle between view and edit modes

components.name: GlassKeyValueEditor
ariaEnhancements: Added role='group' and aria-label to outer container
Added role='group' and aria-label to each key-value pair
Added aria-label to key inputs
Added aria-label to value inputs
Added aria-label to remove buttons
Added aria-label to add button

satisfied.description: Added semantic structure with ARIA roles and labels
Enhanced keyboard accessibility with tabIndex and onKeyDown handlers
Added descriptive labels to all form controls
Added proper ARIA roles, labels, and state attributes
Added aria-live regions for dynamic status updates

typeCheck.note: All existing TypeScript errors are pre-existing configuration issues. No new errors introduced by ARIA changes.

syntaxCheck.note: All JSX closing tags properly matched. All ARIA attributes are valid HTML/React attributes.

completed: Add programmatic labels with htmlFor/id associations
Add required field indicators (handled via aria-required where applicable)
Add help text association via aria-describedby
Add invalid state handling via aria-invalid (in components with validation)
Add proper navigation semantics with nav elements and aria-current
Add live regions for dynamic content updates
Add progress indicators with complete value semantics
future: Consider adding aria-required and aria-invalid to additional form components as they add validation
Consider adding aria-describedby for more help text associations
Add focus management for complex wizards and dialogs
Consider adding skip links for multi-step forms
